title: The warning for Podman System Reset does not say it will delete persistant volumes
body:
### Issue Description

Just a small detail. On Podman 4.2.0, when you do a `podman system reset` you get a warning with a detailed list of items that will be removed. Persistent volumes are not on that list.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create a container with a persistent volume.
2. Do a podman system reset
3. Read the warning
4. Check your volume after the reset


### Describe the results you received

The warning didn't say volumes would be removed. They were removed.

### Describe the results you expected

I wish the warning had warned me.

comments.body: Thank you for reporting. This was fixed in ~~#15663~~ #15634, which then made it into podman 4.3.
